caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a room decorated with framed pictures on the wall. He is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. In the background, a white mannequin wearing a white garment stands near a clothing rack. To the man's left, a logo featuring a stylized eye and the words "THE EYE" is visible, while to his right, red text reads "REALLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man speaks, his facial expressions shifting slightly as he moves his mouth and eyes, though his posture remains relatively still. The setting and surrounding objects, including the wall art and clothing equipment, remain constant as the focus stays on the man speaking into the microphone.
